Title: Verify the application starts correctly
Preconditions: The application is installed and launched.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Check if the application's main screen is displayed.
Expected Result: The application's main screen is displayed.

Title: Verify the weather module
Preconditions: The application is launched and the user is on the main screen.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Weather" button.
2. Check if the weather data is fetched and displayed.
Expected Result: The weather data is fetched and displayed.

Title: Verify the trekking module
Preconditions: The application is launched and the user is on the main screen.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Trekking" button.
2. Check if the list of provinces is fetched and displayed.
3. Select a province from the list.
4. Check if the list of paths for the selected province is fetched and displayed.
5. Select a path from the list.
Expected Result: The list of provinces, paths, and the selected path are fetched and displayed.

Title: Verify the health module
Preconditions: The application is launched and the user is on the main screen.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Health" button.
2. Check if the list of past training data is fetched and displayed.
Expected Result: The list of past training data is fetched and displayed.

Title: Verify user registration
Preconditions: The application is launched and the user is on the main screen.
Test Data: Invalid email, valid email, invalid password, valid password, empty fields
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "SignUp" button.
2. Enter invalid email and password.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
4. Check if an error message is displayed.
5. Enter valid email and password.
6. Click on the "Register" button.
7. Check if the user is registered and redirected to the dashboard.
8. Enter empty fields.
9. Click on the "Register" button.
10. Check if an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: Invalid inputs are rejected, and valid inputs result in successful registration.

Title: Verify user login
Preconditions: The application is launched and the user is on the main screen.
Test Data: Invalid email, valid email, invalid password, valid password
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "SignIn" button.
2. Enter invalid email and password.
3. Click on the "Login" button.
4. Check if an error message is displayed.
5. Enter valid email and password.
6. Click on the "Login" button.
7. Check if the user is logged in and redirected to the dashboard.
Expected Result: Invalid inputs are rejected, and valid inputs result in successful login.

Title: Verify user logout
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "SignOut" button.
2. Check if the user is logged out and redirected to the main screen.
Expected Result: The user is logged out and redirected to the main screen.

Title: Verify user navigation to dashboard
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Dashboard" button.
2. Check if the user is redirected to the dashboard.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Verify user navigation to user list
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "User List" button.
2. Check if the user is redirected to the user list.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the user list.

Title: Verify weather data fetching
Preconditions: The user is on the weather screen.
Test Steps: 1. Check if the weather data is fetched and displayed.
Expected Result: The weather data is fetched and displayed.

Title: Verify weather data fetching with invalid location
Preconditions: The user is on the weather screen.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid location.
2. Check if an error message is displayed.

Title: Verify trekking province selection
Preconditions: The user is on the trekking screen.
Test Steps:
1. Select a province from the list.
2. Check if the list of paths for the selected province is fetched and displayed.
Expected Result: The list of paths for the selected province is fetched and displayed.

Title: Verify trekking path selection
Preconditions: The user is on the trekking screen with the list of paths for a selected province.
Test Steps:
1. Select a path from the list.
2. Check if the path details are displayed.

Title: Verify health training data fetching
Preconditions: The user is on the health screen.
Test Steps: 1. Check if the list of past training data is fetched and displayed.
Expected Result: The list of past training data is fetched and displayed.

Title: Verify health training data fetching with invalid user
Preconditions: The user is not logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Health" button.
2. Check if an error message is displayed.

Title: Verify weather data fetching with invalid API key
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to the server with an invalid API key.
2. Check if an error message is returned.

Title: Verify trekking data fetching with invalid API key
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to the server with an invalid API key.
2. Check if an error message is returned.

Title: Verify health data fetching with invalid API key
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to the server with an invalid API key.
2. Check if an error message is returned.
